title: INTERVIEW: Albania pitches ‘more involving’ EU membership process to fight brain drain
summary_full: Reforming enlargement would tackle a "brain drain" in the Western Balkans, Ferit Hoxha, Albania's Foreign Minister, told Euractiv
summary_public: Reforming enlargement would tackle a "brain drain" in the Western Balkans, Ferit Hoxha, Albania's Foreign Minister, told Euractiv
